title: Acadia Eyes Record-Breaking Revenue In 2025 With Nuplazid And Daybue
text: Acadia Pharmaceuticals is targeting record-breaking revenue in 2025 with its two core brands NUPLAZID and DAYBUE. Following strong Q2 2025 results, the company raised its full-year guidance to $1.045-$1.095 billion. This represents a significant milestone as it marks Acadia's trajectory toward $1 billion in annual revenues. NUPLAZID is tracking toward $665-$690 million in 2025 sales, while DAYBUE is expected to contribute $380-$405 million. The company's expanding commercial team is expected to drive further market penetration. Patient awareness initiatives, including marketing campaigns for NUPLAZID, are expected to drive increased diagnosis and treatment rates. Pipeline catalysts including DAYBUE STIX and the upcoming Phase III PWS data are expected to provide additional growth drivers.
